headline: Track Health, Master Your Day
body: PulseBand Nova gives instant heart‑rate and sleep insights so you can stay energized, while quick phone notifications keep your schedule on track.

headline: All‑Day Power for a Non‑Stop Life
body: With a 7‑day battery and waterproof design, the Nova never quits—so you can focus on meetings, workouts, and everything in between.

headline: The Smartwatch Professionals Swear By
body: Busy young pros choose PulseBand Nova for its seamless health tracking and instant alerts, turning a hectic routine into a smoother, healthier flow.
